description: 计时历史图表按月聚合展示 - 6个月和1年过滤器下图表按月聚合，7天和30天保持按天

userStories.title: ViewModel 新增 filteredTimerCountByMonth StateFlow
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a monthly aggregated data flow so the chart can display monthly counts for 6-month and 1-year views.
acceptanceCriteria: Groups sessions by 'yyyy-MM' format and sums counts per month
filterDays < 180 emits empty list (UI decides not to use it)
Uses combine(_sessionsInTimeRange, _timerFilterTag) pattern matching existing filteredTimerCountByDate
userStories.notes: Reference: HeartRateViewModel.kt line 178-189 for existing filteredTimerCountByDate implementation pattern

userStories.title: TimerBarChart 支持月视图和天视图
userStories.description: As a user, I want the bar chart to correctly display both daily and monthly aggregated data with appropriate axis labels.
acceptanceCriteria: Monthly view: X-axis labels show 'M月' format (e.g. '1月', '2月'), extracted from 'yyyy-MM' date string
Monthly view: no takeLast(14) limit (max 12 bars for 1 year, fits screen)
Daily view: existing logic unchanged including takeLast(14) when > 14 bars
Daily view: X-axis labels show MM-DD format (existing 'pair.date.substring(5)' logic unchanged)
userStories.notes: Reference: TimerHistoryScreen.kt line 206-319 for existing TimerBarChart implementation

userStories.title: UI 层根据 filterDays 切换图表数据源
userStories.description: As a user, I want the chart to automatically show monthly data when I select 6-month or 1-year filter.
acceptanceCriteria: When filterDays is 7 or 30: chart uses filteredTimerCountByDate with isMonthly=false
When filterDays is 180 or 365: chart uses filteredTimerCountByMonth with isMonthly=true
History list always uses filteredTimerSessions, unaffected by chart aggregation
Tag filter (tag dropdown) still works correctly in both daily and monthly views
userStories.notes: Reference: TimerHistoryScreen.kt line 74-79 where TimerBarChart is called
